_meta.description: Dependency graph: rule stem -> the definition rules it references but does not contain. Consumed by seed_definitions: a rule chunk that surfaces above threshold seeds these so the definitions it depends on ride into context with it.
_meta.ratification: v1 edges are the human-validated 'spine -> core siblings' families. scripts/build_dep_graph.py gates that this ratified artifact reproduces them. Extend via scripts/build_dep_graph.py (draft) -> hand-ratify -> add here.
_meta.invariant: depth-1 only; a seeded dep does not recursively seed its own deps.
